mapper.select: select id, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from announcement where status = 1 and is_deleted = 0 order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into announcement(title, content, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{created_at}, #{updated_at}, #{is_deleted})
mapper.select:
select id, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and status = #{status}
from announcement order by updated_at desc
mapper.update:
update announcement
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
status = #{status},
created_at = #{created_at},
updated_at = #{updated_at},
